EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IBuilderItem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a builder item.

[Guid("49944736-3DD8-4E4E-B346-46868E0CF13F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBuilderItem

Properties

Category

The catagory of builder item. The value in this property appears in the Category field of the mosaic catalog.

esriRasterCatalogItemCategory Category { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterCatalogItemCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

Dataset

The function raster dataset associated with builder item.

IFunctionRasterDataset Dataset { get; set; }

Property Value

IFunctionRasterDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

Footprint

The footprint geometry of the function raster dataset that defines regions of valid pixels in the dataset. The footprint geometry may have a coordinate system different from the corresponding dataset.

IGeometry Footprint { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

Seamline

The seamline geometry associated with this builder item.

IGeometry Seamline { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

StereoID

The stereo ID associated with this builder item.

string StereoID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

StereoPairs

The stereo IDs of all items that can be paired with this builder item.

IStringArray StereoPairs { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

URI

The URI object associated with the builder item.

IItemURI URI { get; set; }

Property Value

IItemURI

Examples

Sample Snippet

Variables

The collection of variables associated with this item.

IPropertySet Variables { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

AddVariable(string, object, bool)

Adds a variable to this item's collection given the variable name, value, and a flag that indicates whether the item URI's tag is prefixed with the variable name and separated by a period.

void AddVariable(string VariableName, object vtVariableValue, bool bPrefixWithTag)

Parameters

VariableName string
vtVariableValue object
bPrefixWithTag bool

Examples

Sample Snippet
